{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = King of the Vault
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] accused the [[King]] of selling their home to the [[King of the Vault]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|“Not only have you lost control, you have sold your home to the King of the Vault.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
